brief.audience: healthcare professionals concerned with HIPAA compliance and patient scheduling
painPoints: HIPAA compliance challenges in patient scheduling
brief.coreMessage: Voice AI solution ensuring HIPAA compliance for patient scheduling

headlines: Ensure HIPAA-compliant patient scheduling with Telnyx Voice AI
Reduce patient scheduling delays with sub-500ms latency Voice AI
Telnyx Voice AI: Secure, compliant scheduling across 140+ countries
Simplify HIPAA compliance in healthcare scheduling with one Voice AI platform
Voice AI built on Telnyx's own network for secure patient interactions
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI integrates HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI compliance into a single platform, reducing scheduling delays with sub-500ms latency. Our solution supports 140+ countries and 70+ languages, helping healthcare providers maintain trust and meet regulatory requirements without relying on multiple vendors.

Manage patient scheduling while ensuring HIPAA compliance using Telnyx's Voice AI. With inference co-located on our own network, latency stays under 500ms, enabling fast, secure interactions. Our platform eliminates the need for multiple vendors, streamlining compliance and operational efficiency.

Telnyx Voice AI offers healthcare providers a compliant scheduling solution with built-in HIPAA, SOC2, and PCI standards. Operating on our proprietary network, the platform delivers under 500ms latency and supports global operations in 140+ countries and 70+ languages, simplifying patient communication and compliance.
